use_cases: Displaying photo collections or image galleries in a visually engaging stacked format
Portfolio cards for photographers, designers, or creative professionals
Product showcase cards in e-commerce with multiple image previews
Team member or testimonial cards with layered profile images
Interactive media galleries with hover-reveal animations
ai_summary: An interactive photo showcase card component featuring stacked images that animate on hover with scale, rotation, and lift effects. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring-based animations and includes an active/inactive click state system. The card displays a category, title, and subtitle with a clean, modern design using Tailwind utility classes. Ideal for creative portfolios, media galleries, and visual product showcases where image display is the primary focus.
